description: Occurs when a user successfully initiates a bulk envelope send
Occurs when a user downloads 20 or more documents in an hour
Occurs when a user creates 20 or more envelopes in an hour
Occurs when a user sends 20 or more envelopes in an hour
Occurs when a user signs 20 or more envelopes in an hour
Occurs when a user deletes 20 or more envelopes in an hour
Occurs when a user changes their password from a new location that is 200km or more away from a prior login location.
Occurs when a user logs in multiple times in the past 60 minutes at two different locations more than 100km apart
Occurs when an account’s security policy is updated to disable recipient authentication
Occurs when a user has 6 or more login failures in an hour
Occurs when bulk settings export has been initiated
Occurs when bulk user export has been initiated
